sc.fiji.snt.analysis.curation.PlausibilityCheck.Warning

Packages that use PlausibilityCheck.Warning
Package
Description
sc.fiji.snt
SNT core classes
sc.fiji.snt.analysis.curation
Classes for curation of reconstructions, as implemented by the "Curation Assistant".

    PlausibilityCheck.LiveCheck.check(Path parent, Path child, int branchIndex)
    Evaluates the plausibility of a child path forking from a parent.
    List<PlausibilityCheck.Warning>
    PlausibilityCheck.RadiusContinuity.check(Path parent, Path child, int branchIndex)
     
    List<PlausibilityCheck.Warning>
    PlausibilityCheck.SomaDistance.check(Path parent, Path child, int branchIndex)
    For this check, parent is ignored: it evaluates whether the child's first node is within range of any soma path.

    PlausibilityCheck.TerminalBranchLength.check(Path parent, Path child, int branchIndex)

    PlausibilityMonitor.getCurrentWarnings()
     
    List<PlausibilityCheck.Warning>
    PlausibilityMonitor.onNodeEdited(Path editedPath, int nodeIndex)
    Hook 4: Node editing. Called after a node is moved, inserted, or deleted during edit mode.
    List<PlausibilityCheck.Warning>
    PlausibilityMonitor.onPathFinalized(Path completedChild)
    Hook 3: Path finalization. Called when the user completes an entire path (SNT.finishPath()).
    List<PlausibilityCheck.Warning>
    PlausibilityMonitor.onSegmentCompleted(Path candidateChild)
    Hook 2: Segment completion. Called from SNT.searchFinished() when A* returns a candidate segment, before the user sees the keep/junk dialog.
    List<PlausibilityCheck.Warning>
    PlausibilityMonitor.runDeepScan(Collection<Path> paths)
    Runs all enabled PlausibilityCheck.DeepChecks against the given paths.
    List<PlausibilityCheck.Warning>
    PlausibilityMonitor.runFullScan(Collection<Path> paths)
    Runs all enabled checks (both live and deep) against the given paths.
